prevalence.trend: increasing prevalence with aging and improved survival

incidence.source: Cancer registry and hematology cohort data

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; chronic disease with treatment-related morbidity

vulnerablePopulations: patients with family history of CLL
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Persistent lymphocytosis with flow cytometry; staging by Rai/Binet

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Hundreds of thousands across the EU
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with access to targeted therapies

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Flow cytometry and molecular testing widely available
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Watchful waiting for early-stage; targeted agents (BTK/BCL2 inhibitors) and chemoimmunotherapy when indicated
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access disparities to novel agents across countries
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong hematology networks and access to modern therapies
